_comment: Recurring loops. v1 is interactive (run a due loop while present; ToS-safe on a subscription). v2 operate mode runs them headless on the founder's own API key. The advisor surfaces which are due. cadence_days = how often; min_level = when it becomes relevant; applies_when = required traits; runs = the playbook or skill it triggers; brain_key = where output lands. See skills/casa-loops for how loops run.

loops.title: Weekly retro and system improvement
loops.why: Review what shipped, fix what stalled, improve one loop. The meta-loop.

loops.title: Compliance and deadline heartbeat
loops.why: Catch filing windows, renewals, and legal deadlines before they slip.

loops.title: Content and distribution engine
loops.why: Publish, then learn which content actually drives pipeline.

loops.title: Weekly metrics pulse
loops.why: Read the numbers, flag anomalies, set the week's focus.

loops.title: Customer insight digestion
loops.why: Turn support, calls, and NPS into roadmap and positioning input.

loops.title: Sales pipeline review
loops.why: Move deals, learn why you win and lose, update the objection library.

loops.title: Monthly financial close
loops.why: Reconcile, update burn and runway, flag anomalies.

loops.title: Growth experiment loop
loops.why: Ship one experiment, log the result, retire what loses.
